# `economy/state_gdp_inr_crore`

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by `python -m yen_gov indicator-pages`. Do not hand-edit. -->

**Title**: State GDP (₹ crore, current and constant prices)  
**One-line**: Per-state GSDP (Gross State Domestic Product) in ₹ crore, faceted by price basis.  
**Last Updated**: 2026-05-15T20:53:11Z (auto-generated)  
**Source artifact**: [`datasets/indicators/in/economy/state_gdp_inr_crore.json`](../../../../datasets/indicators/in/economy/state_gdp_inr_crore.json)

## Definition

Per-state GSDP (Gross State Domestic Product) in ₹ crore, faceted by price basis. Use 'current' for share-of-national rankings, 'constant' for state-level growth-rate analysis. Coverage varies by state — small states/UTs only enter the series after they were carved out (Telangana from 2014-15, Ladakh from 2019-20).

| Field | Value |

| Default mode | `absolute` |

## Coverage

- **Temporal**: 2011-04..2024-04 (14 periods)
- **Spatial**: India (states + UTs) (34 entities)
- **Rows on disk**: 910

## Methodology vintage

MoSPI per-state GSDP series. Constant prices rebased to 2011-12. Compiled by State Directorates of Economics & Statistics with MoSPI methodology guidance.

## Notes

GSDP is the within-state production view; for who-consumes-what, see per-capita consumption. State totals will not sum exactly to national GDP because of differences in base years and revision timing across the 36 state-level series.
